iAbout / Specs
⌬ WireIP Network™ · Settlement Rail v4.1

The Plumbing of Intellectual Property Value

WireIP is the institutional payment rail for IP — built on an asynchronous BFT DAG, settled in audited stablecoins, and backed by $WIP and the OTW Treasury's hard-asset reserves. We process IP issuance, royalty splits, licensing, and cross-border IP commerce with the throughput of a card network and the sovereignty of a digital commodity. In a stablecoin failure, $WIP deploys as the last-resort backstop — par redemption for every tokenized creator.

Issue a CBIA™ Digital Deed

Issue and settle a CBIA™ Digital Deed for your IP on the WireIP DAG. The file is hashed locally, encrypted (AES-256), anchored to your SecureNode™ SSD vault, and routed through stablecoin settlement rails — clearing in ~4–8 seconds (soft final) and finalizing in ~12–20 seconds (hard final). Per protocol, all issuance requires Proof of Agency™ via NFC tap. After mint, deploy to vault only or have AI Sentinel agents settle the deed with selected national IP offices.
1/1 MASTER
ABSOLUTE MASTER TOKEN — ORIGINAL OF ONE ⚠ NOT AN NFT
Every mint issues a single, sovereign 1/1 Master Token — the original, irreproducible Digital Deed of your intellectual property. Fractional royalty tokens (when enabled below) are derivatives — they reference the Master, they do not replace it. These are Tokenized IP Assets with Real-World Value, court-recognizable, leverage-eligible, and backed by hard treasury reserves — not collectibles, not JPEGs, not speculation.

Upload and Connect

Bring an existing tokenized asset into your vault from a connected wallet, or upload a fresh file to begin a new CBIA™ Digital Deed. Either path hashes locally, encrypts to your SecureNode™ SSD vault, and prepares the asset for mint.
1

Upload Asset File

No file
⬆
Drop file here or click to browse
Image · Video · Audio · PDF · Document · Code · Any format · < 2 GB
File is hashed in your browser (SHA-256 → BLAKE3-style CBIA payload). Original bytes are sent encrypted to SecureNode™ — they never leave your device unencrypted.
⌬

Originality & AI Provenance Check

Standby
Sentinel agents screen the asset against the WireIP global infringement index, run AI-generation detection on the bytes, validate EXIF / file metadata for AI-tool fingerprints (DALL·E, Midjourney, Stable Diffusion, GPT, Sora, etc.), and compare perceptual hash against your existing vault.

Asset ID Visualizer

Asset name + hex color + creator → unique visual ID
Every asset gets a unique visual ID built from three identifiers you control: the asset name shown on the canvas, a color hex code (drag the waveform or paste a hex), and a procedural pattern seed (16M+ unique patterns). Combined with your creator name, this generates a deterministic Asset ID for the deed certificate, vault cards, search results, and DAG vertex.

⚜

IP Ownership Proof — qualifies asset for leverage

Unqualified for leverage
Upload an authentic registration document (US Copyright Office certificate, USPTO Patent Grant, USPTO Trademark Registration, EUIPO / WIPO / UKIPO certificate, assignment, or chain-of-title document) to prove you legally own this IP. AGI Sentinel cross-checks the registration number, owner name, and validity dates. Verified ownership unlocks loan-against-asset (leverage) eligibility.
⚜
Drop registration certificate or grant document
Copyright Office cert · USPTO grant · TM registration · WIPO · EUIPO · assignments · PDF / JPG / PNG
○ No ownership proof attached. Asset can still be minted but will not be leverage-qualified.
6

Tokenization Parameters

Proof-of-Value · Real-World Valuation $WIP  $0.85  
Initial Stake reflects the asset's verifiable real-world value. Add proof items below — revenue statements, licenses, court judgments, streaming counts, royalty reports — and run an AI Authenticity Scan on each. The AI reads the document text, looks for digital + physical manipulation tells (compression artifacts, copy-paste edges, EXIF tampering, OCR mismatch), and assigns a confidence score. Only verified value counts toward the stake.
No proof yet — add your first Proof-of-Value item below.
Claimed Value $0
AI-Verified Value $0
Stake Ratio 100%
100% = stake matches the asset's USD value 1:1 at the live $WIP price (default). Slide down for a partial-collateral margin model.
Required Stake USD $0
→ Stake in $WIP 0 $WIP
% of Total Supply (100M) 0.0000%
Run AI Authenticity Scan on each proof to certify the value.
⚔
AI Sentinel Soldier™ — Auto-File to IP Office Scan · analyze · submit · return proof of entry
Enable an AI Sentinel Soldier (AI Agent) to automatically scan and analyze this asset, then submit it to your local jurisdictional IP office on your behalf — U.S. Copyright Office, USPTO Patent / Trademark, WIPO, EPO, UKIPO, CIPO, JPO, KIPO, or CNIPA. The Sentinel handles the filing, pays the fee from your wallet, tracks the case, and returns a signed proof-of-entry receipt with the official case number anchored to your CBIA™ Deed.
Your Local Jurisdiction
Target Office (Auto-Selected by Type)
✓
Scan asset bytes & metadata (EXIF, AI-fingerprints, PHash)
✓
Auto-fill registration application from your asset details
✓
Submit to office & pay filing fee (stablecoin from wallet)
✓
Track case · respond to examiner · confirm registration
✓
Return signed Proof-of-Entry™ receipt to your vault
✓
Anchor official case # to your CBIA™ Digital Deed on-chain
Off: The deed mints to your sovereign WireIP vault only. You can still dispatch a Sentinel later from Deploy & Register. On: Auto-dispatch begins immediately after mint — first proof-of-entry typically returns in 24–72 hours.
6

Proof of Agency™ & Mint

PoA pending
Per protocol, all minting requires NFC tap on your SecureCard™. If SecureNode is connected, this issues a real challenge. Otherwise, simulated PoA is recorded.

Deploy & Register

Deed minted · ready to deploy
Your CBIA™ Deed is minted on the WireIP DAG. Choose how to deploy it:

Option A — Vault Only

Keep the deed sovereign on your SecureNode™ SSD vault. No external registry. Maximum privacy. Always reversible.

Option B — AI Sentinel Submission

Sentinel Soldiers™ submit your deed automatically to selected national IP offices. They handle filings, fees, and tracking on your behalf.

Select IP Offices

AI Sentinel agents are dispatched in parallel — one per office. Choose any combination:

Agent Status

My Vault

Tokenized assets registered to your wallet. Each card is a CBIA™ Digital Deed anchored on the WireIP DAG.
All
Copyright
Patent
Trademark
Trade Secret

Treasury & Real-World Value

Aggregate real-world valuation of every CBIA™ deed in your vault. Valuations are sourced from court-verified judgements, streaming royalties (auto-pulled by AGI Sentinel from connected platforms), licensing deals, professional appraisals, and on-chain comparables. LTV (Loan-to-Value) is shown live for any leveraged asset.

Asset Valuations

0 assets

Registry Status

Live status of AI Sentinel agents dispatched to IP registration offices. Each agent autonomously handles submission, fees, examiner correspondence, and confirmation tracking on behalf of one deed at one office.

$WIP Tokenomics & Treasury

Real-time view of $WIP — the WireIP Network's underlying coin — and the Treasury's diversified hard-asset backing. $WIP has a fixed maximum supply of 100 million units. The Treasury holds gold, T-Bills, real estate, energy, cryptocurrencies, sovereign debt, and physical infrastructure to back tokenized IP value and stand by as a backstop in the event of stablecoin failure.

WireIP Validators Globe

Live map of validator nodes around the world. Record labels, recording studios, art centers, and creative studios act as validators — pledging $WIP to validate IP claims and earn fees. Atlanta, GA hosts the densest cluster as the network's creative hub. Drag to rotate, scroll to zoom, click any node for details.

Analytics

Private Networks & Collectives

Create your own private network — a collective of creators, labels, studios, art centers and validators that operate as a sub-DAG within WireIP. Record companies join as nodes; studios and art centers act as validators. Royalties, governance, and licensing flow inside the network's perimeter.

Collaborators

Add creators, co-authors, producers, agents, lawyers, and partners to your collaboration roster. Collaborators can be tagged on minted CBIA™ deeds and added as members of your private networks. They appear in the left sidebar for quick access.

Wallet & Stablecoins

Connect a Web3 wallet to pay collaborators, hire service providers, and execute smart-contract escrows. WireIP transacts only in audited stablecoins — USDT · USD1 · USDP · USDC. $WIP is the underlying asset backing tokenized IP value; in the event of a stablecoin failure or depeg, the protocol auto-deploys $WIP to settle outstanding obligations and tokenized users can withdraw $WIP at par.

Connect a Wallet

Pick a provider. WireIP never holds your private keys — connections are read/sign-only and routed through SecureNode where available.

Quick Actions

Recent Payments

Service Marketplace

Hire vetted creative professionals — photographers, songwriters, designers, coders, developers, videographers, musicians, producers, artists. All work is escrowed in stablecoins under a smart-contract agreement; AGI Sentinel reviews every contract for unfair clauses and bad-faith language before signature. Payment auto-releases on milestone delivery.

IP for Sale & Auction

Buy, sell, and auction full ownership of CBIA™ tokenized IP. Listings include fixed-price sales, timed auctions, and exclusive license rights. All transactions settle in stablecoin via smart-contract escrow with AGI Sentinel review.
All Listings
Fixed Sale
Auction
My Listings
Sold

My Engagements

Active jobs you've posted, ones you've taken on, and completed engagements. Each is backed by a smart contract with milestone-based escrow.
Jobs I Posted
Work I Accepted
Completed

Smart Contracts

Programmable agreements for service work, licensing, NDAs, royalty splits, and collaboration. AGI Sentinel auto-reviews every draft, scoring fairness and flagging asymmetric terms, ambiguous wording, hidden kill-switches, and bad-faith language before any party signs.

Neural Net IP Scanner

AGI Sentinel™ neural network scans the open internet — search engines, image search, social media, marketplaces, NFT platforms, code repos, AI training datasets, plagiarism databases — for unauthorized uses of any asset in your vault. Matches are scored by perceptual hash, embedding similarity, and metadata correlation.

Continuous Surveillance

Activate the Neural Net to crawl the public internet on a rolling schedule. Sentinel agents compute perceptual hashes (pHash for images, audio fingerprints, code embeddings, text shingles) and compare against your vault's CBIA payloads. Confirmed infringement matches are surfaced here with one-click DMCA / cease-and-desist actions.

Security Center

Real-time defense posture for the WireIP DAG, $WIP coin protocol, and SecureNode vault layer. Every primitive is hardened to military-grade standards: FIPS 140-2 Level 3 secure elements, NIST-approved algorithms, post-quantum-ready signatures, and hardware-rooted attestation.

OPERATIONAL STATUS

FOR OFFICIAL USE ▣ MILITARY GRADE ▣ FIPS 140-2 L3 ▣ NIST SP 800-53

WireIP Network™ runs hardened cryptographic primitives end-to-end. Network is currently SECURE / NOMINAL. All Sentinel agents online. Backstop dormant. No active intrusions in the last 24h.

Live System Telemetry

real-time

⚛ QUANTUM ATTACK SIMULATOR

Launch a simulated quantum-computer attack against the network to validate defense posture. The simulator runs Shor's-algorithm against current Ed25519 signatures, then triggers the post-quantum hybrid (CRYSTALS-Dilithium + SPHINCS+) backstop. No real signatures are at risk — this is a defense drill.

⚔ Deploy Sentinel Soldiers (Defensive)

0 deployed

Deploy AGI Sentinel Soldiers to defend specific surfaces of the network on your behalf. Each unit consumes $WIP for stake-bonded operation and runs autonomously with read-only access. Recall any soldier at any time — bonded $WIP returns less the operational fee. Unlike attackers, Sentinels never modify state without human command.

SecureNode™ Interface

Phase 1 connects to any compliant SSD (NFC + Secure Element). Phase 2 is the proprietary SecureNode™ SSD with FIPS 140-2 L3, Ti-6Al-4V enclosure, AES-256 NVMe, TPM 2.0.

Connection Settings

🧬 SSD ↔ Network · Code DNA Match

Idle

Scan files on your local SSD vault and cross-match their CBIA hashes against assets tokenized on the WireIP Network. Identical matches surface as already-tokenized deeds, near-matches as similar IP, and for-sale matches as listed on marketplace.

⚜ Order Hardware & Software

OFFICIAL OUTSIDE THE WIRE STORE

Don't have SecureNode™ yet? Order your NFC SecureCard™ for hardware-rooted Proof of Agency, and license the SecureNode™ software interface that bridges this app to your encrypted SSD vault. All orders settle in stablecoin · ships from Atlanta, GA.

⌬
SecureCard™ NFC
Physical Human Gate · MPC Setup
Tamper-evident NFC card with on-card Ed25519 key. Required for all minting, governance, and treasury actions. FIPS 140-2 L3 secure element, ISO/IEC 14443.
  • Ed25519 on-card signing
  • FIPS 140-2 Level 3 element
  • Multi-Party Computation trusted setup
  • Physical TAPP gate for all actions
  • Anti-tamper · IP67 rated
$249 USDC · USDT · $WIP
⛁
SecureNode™ Software
SSD Vault Interface · 3 Tiers
The local service that encrypts asset bytes to your SSD and bridges the WireIP DAG. Connects to any compliant SSD (NFC + Secure Element) or proprietary SecureNode™ SSD.
  • AES-256-GCM disk encryption
  • Local API on 127.0.0.1:8443
  • macOS · Windows · Linux
  • BLAKE3 vertex anchoring
  • Auto-updates via signed channel
$0–$1,499 FREE / PRO / ENTERPRISE

⚠

Danger Zone

Erase ALL local data — assets, wallet, SecureNode credentials, vault drafts, preferences. Use only when starting fresh on this device. This cannot be undone.

Deleted Assets

Assets you have deleted from the vault. They remain here for the retention window set in Settings (default: 30 days), then auto-purge. You can restore any time before that.

WireIP Network™ — Specifications

Reference card distilled from the Black Paper.

Vertex Schema

vertex_idBLAKE3 hash
parent_refs[V1, V2, … up to k=6]
payload_typeCBIA_MINT, WIP_TX, POHAW, POA, ROYALTY, GOV_VOTE, LENDING, TREASURY, SECURE_CARD, VERTEX_TIP
poa_signatureEd25519 (NFC SecureCard™)
stake_weight$WIP locked

Consensus & Throughput

typeDAG Async BFT
soft final~4–8 seconds (k=6)
hard final~12–20 seconds
tps target5,000+

Outside The Wire (vesting)10%
Strategic / R&D / Liquidity5% / 5% / 5%
Anti-whale cap5% per wallet

Connect to SecureNode™

WireIP Vault needs your locally-running SecureNode™ service to encrypt and store asset bytes on the SSD vault. Browsers cannot write to your SSD directly — by design.
